name: action-sheet
description: iOS-style action sheet block with list of actions.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the action sheet is visible.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the action sheet is dismissed.

props.name: options
props.description: List of action items to display. Each option has a label, optional icon, and onPress callback.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional heading displayed at the top of the action sheet.

props.name: message
props.description: Optional descriptive text displayed below the title.

props.name: showCancel
props.description: Whether to show a cancel button at the bottom of the action sheet.
